block_00: Developing a Trading Strategy of Your Own
block_01: Why use someone else’s trading strategy when you can develop your own? All professional traders use their own trading strategies. It is time for you to make one, as well. Learn why it is important to tailor your strategy to the asset and time frame you are about to trade and why it is crucial to learn from other traders while you learn.
block_02: This article is a step by step guide for novice traders on how to develop their first trading strategy. Read the full article for more information
block_05: You probably already know that on the IQ Option platform you can close the deals automatically when a certain condition is met. However, there is also a possibility to open the deals automatically, which can come in handy to those who want to automate their trading and enjoy trading stocks.
block_07: Commodity Channel Index: Tips, Tricks and How To’s
block_08: The Commodity Channel Index, also known as the CCI, is an outstanding oscillator-type indicator. Use it to determine overbought and oversold levels, pinpoint trend reversals and analyze the asset. Learn how to set it up and use in trading by reading the article.
